rulings.Case Title: RANDY TREAS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 21, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Sequoia Ventures Inc.'s Motion to Dismiss for Delay in prosecution is continued on the court's own motion to January 9, 2018. =(503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: DANNY BLACK ET AL VS. ALLIS-CHALMERS CORPORATION PRODUCT LIABILITY TRUST
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 21, 2017 in Department 503, Line 2. Plaintiffs' demurrer to defendant Union Carbide Corp.'s answer to complaint is continued on the court's own motion to January 10, 2018. =(503/CML)
